scenarios.id: Match9 - Match deprecated scenarios-[1] Variable length relationship variables are lists of relationships
scenarios.description: [1] Variable length relationship variables are lists of relationships

scenarios.id: Match9 - Match deprecated scenarios-[2] Return relationships by collecting them as a list - directed, one way
scenarios.description: [2] Return relationships by collecting them as a list - directed, one way

scenarios.id: Match9 - Match deprecated scenarios-[3] Return relationships by collecting them as a list - undirected, starting from two extremes
scenarios.description: [3] Return relationships by collecting them as a list - undirected, starting from two extremes

scenarios.id: Match9 - Match deprecated scenarios-[5] Variable length pattern with label predicate on both sides
scenarios.description: [5] Variable length pattern with label predicate on both sides

scenarios.id: Match9 - Match deprecated scenarios-[6] Matching relationships into a list and matching variable length using the list, with bound nodes
scenarios.description: [6] Matching relationships into a list and matching variable length using the list, with bound nodes
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)-[r1]->()-[r2]->(b)
WITH [r1, r2] AS rs, a AS first, b AS second
  LIMIT 1
MATCH (first)-[rs*]->(second)
RETURN first, second

scenarios.id: Match9 - Match deprecated scenarios-[7] Matching relationships into a list and matching variable length using the list, with bound nodes, wrong direction
scenarios.description: [7] Matching relationships into a list and matching variable length using the list, with bound nodes, wrong direction
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)-[r1]->()-[r2]->(b)
WITH [r1, r2] AS rs, a AS second, b AS first
  LIMIT 1
MATCH (first)-[rs*]->(second)
RETURN first, second

scenarios.id: Match9 - Match deprecated scenarios-[8] Variable length relationship in OPTIONAL MATCH
scenarios.description: [8] Variable length relationship in OPTIONAL MATCH
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:A), (b:B)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[r*]-(b)
WHERE r IS NULL
  AND a <> b
RETURN b

scenarios.id: Match9 - Match deprecated scenarios-[9] Optionally matching named paths with variable length patterns
scenarios.description: [9] Optionally matching named paths with variable length patterns
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a {name: 'A'}), (x)
WHERE x.name IN ['B', 'C']
OPTIONAL MATCH p = (a)-[r*]->(x)
RETURN r, x, p
